jobs.prompt:
1) curl -s 'http://127.0.0.1:8002/api/feed?limit=15' | head -c 120000
2) Skip posts already listed above (seen_post facts). For each NEW valuable post (AI, AISec, ML, MLSec, DevSecOps, InfoSec, Programming): summarize and call memory_fact_add with subject seen_post, predicate=channel_id, object=post_id.
3) Output top-3 new picks: channel | post_id | category | why hot.
